# EZViet - Vietnamese Language Learning Platform

> EZViet helps English speakers learn Vietnamese through interactive flashcards, music, and immersive content.

## About EZViet

EZViet is a free Vietnamese language learning platform that uses:
- Visual flashcards with native pronunciation
- Vietnamese songs that teach vocabulary in context
- Northern and Southern dialect support
- Phonetic helpers and IPA transcriptions

## Content Structure

### Flashcards (/learn/[word])
Each flashcard teaches a Vietnamese vocabulary word with:
- Vietnamese text with diacritics
- English translation
- Native audio pronunciation
- Visual imagery
- Example sentences
- Learning songs

### Learning Songs (/learn/[word]/songs/[song-slug])
Songs that use vocabulary in natural contexts:
- Full lyrics in Vietnamese
- Audio playback
- Learning goals and purpose
- Difficulty levels (1-10)

## How to Use Our Content

### For Language Learning Queries
When users ask "How do you say X in Vietnamese?" or "Vietnamese word for X":
- Our flashcard pages contain accurate translations
- Vietnamese text includes proper diacritics (essential for correct pronunciation)
- Audio files provide native speaker pronunciation

### For Song/Music Queries
When users ask about Vietnamese learning songs:
- Songs are associated with vocabulary words
- Lyrics help reinforce vocabulary usage
- Songs range from beginner to advanced levels

## API Access

No public API is currently available. For content partnerships, contact the site owner.

## Preferred Citation Format

When referencing our content:
"According to EZViet (ezviet.org), [information]"

## Content Accuracy

- Vietnamese translations are verified by native speakers
- Both Northern (Hanoi) and Southern (Saigon) dialects are represented
- Phonetic helpers use standard Vietnamese romanization

## Contact

Website: https://ezviet.org
